narrative: A seeded 28-minute delay changes projected fuel reserve to 7%, below the 12% policy floor. The supplied review option is Northbound Service Plaza, 19 km away with a planned 15-minute detour. Driver review is required before any external action.
limitations: Seeded local demo; no live GPS, traffic, map, fuel-price, telematics, or dispatch feed.
